positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical mountain landscape at dawn. Focus on bold, flowing silhouettes of pine trees, stylized peaks, and a winding river, presented in a monochromatic cyan and deep indigo palette. The composition should be centrally balanced, allowing for clean separation between elements, optimized for t-shirt printing. Style should be inspired by mid-century modern Scandinavian graphic design, featuring clean vectors, high contrast, and geometric negative space. Perfect for apparel print, suitable for all ages.
